marshmap 0.0.0.9000
  • Reference

Combine multiple geoTIFF maps into a single integrated map

Source: R/do_layer.R
do_layer.Rd

Worker function for layer(). Reads a base map and recursively fills specified codes with values from other maps, producing an integrated classification raster. Each fill rule replaces all cells with a given code in its parent map with the corresponding cells from a fill map. Fill rules can nest arbitrarily: a code in a fill map can itself be filled from yet another map.

Usage

do_layer(name, rep = NULL)

Arguments

name

(character) base name of the YAML config in pars/unet/. For example, 'test1' reads pars/unet/test1.yml.

rep

Throwaway argument to make slurmcollie happy.

Value

Invisibly returns the path to the integrated GeoTIFF.

Details

Produces:

  1. The integrated map as <result>.tif (LZW-compressed, with color table and VAT)

  2. A YAML sidecar <result>_layer.yml documenting the resolved fill tree, the final class legend (code, name, source map), and a timestamp

On this page
